headline: Data Storage Stocks Have Had a Great Year So Far. It Could Be About to Get Better.

headline: Cantor Fitzgerald Raises Western Digital Price Target to $500: Is the HDD Squeeze Just Getting Started?

headline: Seagate Price Target Soars to $700 at BofA and Cantor Fitzgerald: Is the HDD Boom Going Vertical?
summary: Two major Wall Street firms independently lifted their price targets on Seagate Technology (NASDAQ:STX) to $700 on Monday, citing structural tightness in the hard disk drive market and the ramp of next-generation HAMR storage. headline: 3 Reasons Why Sandisk Is Up 61% in April
summary: Shares of SanDisk (NASDAQ:SNDK) are climbing again Monday morning, with SNDK stock up roughly 5% in early trading to about $1,046.
